ddls:
CREATE TABLE "plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plan */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the plan (e.g., 1st, 2nd, Annual Plans) */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Start year of the plan */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* End year of the plan */,
  "main_objective" TEXT /* Main objective of the plan */,
  "plan_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the plan */,
  "budget" REAL /* Total budget allocated for the plan */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the plan (e.g., Active, Completed, Draft) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the plan */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the plan was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the plan */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the plan was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector (e.g., Agriculture, Industry) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "sector_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the sector */,
  "sector_type" TEXT /* Type of the sector (e.g., Primary, Secondary, Tertiary) */,
  "sector_weight" REAL /* Weight or importance of the sector in the economy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "targets" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plan the target belongs to */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector the target belongs to */,
  "target_value" REAL /* Target value for the sector */,
  "target_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the target */,
  "target_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the target value */,
  "target_start_value" REAL /* Starting value of the target */,
  "target_end_value" REAL /* Ending value of the target */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the target */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the target was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the target */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the target was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_targets_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES plans ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_targets_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "achievements" (
  "achievement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each achievement */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plan the achievement belongs to */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector the achievement belongs to */,
  "achievement_value" REAL /* Achievement value for the sector */,
  "achievement_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the achievement */,
  "achievement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the achievement value */,
  "achievement_start_value" REAL /* Starting value of the achievement */,
  "achievement_end_value" REAL /* Ending value of the achievement */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the achievement */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the achievement was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the achievement */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the achievement was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("achievement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_achievements_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_achievements_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plan_sector_targets" (
  "plan_sector_target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plan-sector-target relationship */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plan */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector */,
  "target_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target */,
  "target_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the target for the plan-sector relationship */,
  "target_start_value" REAL /* Starting value of the target for the plan-sector relationship */,
  "target_end_value" REAL /* Ending value of the target for the plan-sector relationship */,
  "target_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the target value */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the relationship */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the relationship */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_sector_target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plan_sector_targets_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES plans ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plan_sector_targets_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plan_sector_targets_target_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_id") REFERENCES targets ("target_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plan_sector_achievements" (
  "plan_sector_achievement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plan-sector-achievement relationship */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plan */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector */,
  "achievement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the achievement */,
  "achievement_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the achievement for the plan-sector relationship */,
  "achievement_start_value" REAL /* Starting value of the achievement for the plan-sector relationship */,
  "achievement_end_value" REAL /* Ending value of the achievement for the plan-sector relationship */,
  "achievement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the achievement value */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the relationship */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the relationship */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_sector_achievement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plan_sector_achievements_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES plans ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plan_sector_achievements_achievement_id FOREIGN KEY ("achievement_id") REFERENCES achievements ("achievement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plan_sector_achievements_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., policymaker, analyst) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or division of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., Annual, Quarterly) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., Draft, Published) */,
  "report_path" TEXT /* Path to the report file */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the visualization */,
  "visualization_name" TEXT /* Name of the visualization */,
  "visualization_date" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was generated */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of the visualization (e.g., Bar Chart, Line Chart) */,
  "visualization_status" TEXT /* Status of the visualization (e.g., Draft, Published) */,
  "visualization_path" TEXT /* Path to the visualization file */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plan_sector_target_achievements" (
  "plan_sector_target_achievement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plan-sector-target-achievement relationship */,
  "plan_sector_target_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plan-sector-target relationship */,
  "achievement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the achievement */,
  "achievement_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the achievement for the plan-sector-target relationship */,
  "achievement_start_value" REAL /* Starting value of the achievement for the plan-sector-target relationship */,
  "achievement_end_value" REAL /* Ending value of the achievement for the plan-sector-target relationship */,
  "achievement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the achievement value */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the relationship */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the relationship */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_sector_target_achievement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plan_sector_target_achievements_achievement_id FOREIGN KEY ("achievement_id") REFERENCES achievements ("achievement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plan_sector_target_achievements_plan_sector_target_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_sector_target_id") REFERENCES plan_sector_targets ("plan_sector_target_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sector_indicators" (
  "sector_indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector indicator */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the indicator */,
  "indicator_value" REAL /* Value of the indicator */,
  "indicator_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the indicator */,
  "indicator_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the indicator value */,
  "indicator_start_value" REAL /* Starting value of the indicator */,
  "indicator_end_value" REAL /* Ending value of the indicator */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the indicator */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the indicator was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the indicator */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the indicator was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sector_indicators_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)
